metadata.description: Browse Alison Aquinas' shared-skills, ci-cd, software-design, and doc-skills Claude Code plugins and the skills they include.

plugins.name: shared-skills
plugins.description: Reusable Claude Code skills for common developer workflows and shared utilities.

plugins.name: ci-cd
plugins.description: Claude Code skills focused on CI/CD pipelines, release flows, and delivery automation.

plugins.name: software-design
plugins.description: Claude Code skills focused on software design, OOP, architecture, and maintainability guidance.

plugins.name: doc-skills
plugins.description: Claude Code skills for creating and editing Word, PowerPoint, Excel, and PDF documents.
